title: Cobblemon : Shiny & Legendary fossil
description: An addon of cobblemon to add shiny and legendary fossil to the game where you can find it in chest all around your world rarely
body:
**Cobblemon: Shiny & Legendary Fossils** is an addon for Cobblemon that brings a new, immersive way to obtain Shiny Pokémon through exploration.

This mod introduces Shiny Fossils — extremely rare relics that can be found in loot containers across the world. Chests, barrels, minecart chests, shulkers, and vaults may now hide these precious fossils, making every structure worth exploring. When revived, these fossils grant you a Shiny Pokémon, keeping them rare, special, and truly rewarding.

The mod is designed to feel natural within Cobblemon’s progression:
no easy shortcuts, no farmable exploits — only discovery, adventure, and luck.

For server owners and modpack creators, all drop rates can be adjusted in-game using simple commands, allowing perfect balance for any playstyle, from hardcore survival to more generous exploration-focused packs.

_⚠️ Legendary Fossils are currently Work In Progress
They are planned for a future update and are not yet available in this version._
